# Sealmetrics

> Privacy-first web analytics platform that measures 100% of traffic without cookies or consent banners.

## Getting Started

- [What is Sealmetrics](https://sealmetrics.com/docs/what-is-sealmetrics): Overview of the platform and its cookieless tracking approach.
- [Quick Start Guide](https://sealmetrics.com/docs/quick-start): Install the tracking snippet and start collecting data in minutes.
- [How Sealmetrics Works](https://sealmetrics.com/docs/how-it-works): Technical explanation of the privacy-safe measurement methodology.

## Installation

- [JavaScript Snippet](https://sealmetrics.com/docs/javascript-snippet): Add the async script tag to your HTML to enable tracking.
- [Google Tag Manager](https://sealmetrics.com/docs/google-tag-manager): Deploy Sealmetrics via GTM without touching source code.
- [WordPress Plugin](https://sealmetrics.com/docs/wordpress): Install and configure the official WordPress plugin.

## Core Concepts

- [Cookieless Tracking](https://sealmetrics.com/docs/cookieless-tracking): How Sealmetrics identifies sessions without cookies or fingerprinting.
- [Sessions and Pageviews](https://sealmetrics.com/docs/sessions-pageviews): Definitions and how they are counted in reports.
- [Traffic Sources](https://sealmetrics.com/docs/traffic-sources): How Sealmetrics attributes visits to channels, campaigns, and referrers.
- [Goals and Conversions](https://sealmetrics.com/docs/goals): Set up and track conversion events across your site.

## Reports

- [Dashboard Overview](https://sealmetrics.com/docs/dashboard): Navigate the main analytics dashboard and understand each metric.
- [Acquisition Report](https://sealmetrics.com/docs/acquisition): Analyse where your visitors come from.
- [Behaviour Report](https://sealmetrics.com/docs/behaviour): Understand how visitors interact with your content.
- [Conversions Report](https://sealmetrics.com/docs/conversions): Track goal completions and measure conversion rates.

## Privacy & Compliance

- [GDPR Compliance](https://sealmetrics.com/docs/gdpr): How Sealmetrics operates within GDPR requirements without consent banners.
- [No Cookie Policy](https://sealmetrics.com/docs/no-cookies): Details on the zero-cookie architecture and what data is processed.
- [Data Retention](https://sealmetrics.com/docs/data-retention): Default retention periods and how to configure them.

## API & Integrations

- [REST API Overview](https://sealmetrics.com/docs/api): Authenticate and query your analytics data programmatically.
- [API Endpoints Reference](https://sealmetrics.com/docs/api-reference): Full list of available endpoints, parameters, and response schemas.
- [Zapier Integration](https://sealmetrics.com/docs/zapier): Connect Sealmetrics events to thousands of apps via Zapier.

## Account & Billing

- [Managing Users](https://sealmetrics.com/docs/users): Invite team members and assign roles within your account.
- [Plans and Pricing](https://sealmetrics.com/docs/pricing): Compare available plans and understand usage limits.
- [Billing FAQ](https://sealmetrics.com/docs/billing-faq): Common questions about invoices, upgrades, and cancellations.
